zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Margaret Rippingale於1548年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其時，她的父親John Rippingale18歲，母親Joan Amis28歲。她於1561年6月22日與William Carlton在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾朗 班寧頓結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Margaret Rippingale于1548年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其时，她的父亲John Rippingale18岁，母亲Joan Amis28岁。她于1561年6月22日与William Carlton在英国英格兰林可爾史爾朗 班寧頓结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年在英国英格兰倫敦享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rippingale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Margaret Rippingale was born in 1548, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Rippingale, was 18 and her mother, Joan Amis, was 28. She married William Carlton on 22 June 1561, in Long Bennington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1614, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Margaret Rippingale est née en 1548, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Rippingale, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joan Amis, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Carlton le 22 juin 1561, à Long Bennington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1614, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

Lei sposato William Carlton il 22 giugno 1561, nel Long Bennington, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joan Margaret Rippingaleが1548年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父John Rippingaleは18歳，母Joan Amisは28歳であった。1561年6月22日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロング ベニントンでWilliam Carltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Margaret Rippingale(이)가 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Rippingale(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Amis(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1561년 6월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 론그 벤잉턴에서 William Carlton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Margaret Rippingale nasceu em 1548, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Rippingale, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Joan Amis, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Carlton em 22 de junho de 1561, em Long Bennington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1614, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Margaret Rippingale родилась в 1548 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Rippingale было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Amis, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Carlton 22 июня 1561 г. в местности лонг беннингтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1614 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Margaret Rippingale nació en 1548, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Rippingale, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Joan Amis, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Carlton el 22 de junio de 1561, en Long Bennington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1614, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
